series_metadata.series_title: Managed Care Organization (MCO) SOC1 Reports and independently audited financial statements
series_metadata.series_description: The Managed Care Organization (MCO) SOC1 (Service Organization Control 1 report is written documentation of the internal controls that are likely to be relevant to an audit of a customer’s financial statements) reports are completed by independent auditors of the MCO’s and are submitted electronically through the MCO portal. SOC1 reports provide assurance to the BWC and external auditors concerning the MCO’s IT controls for the provider accounts. BWC evaluates the SOC1 reports to assess the risk of partnering with the MCOs. BWC evaluates the independently audited financial statements to ensure the financial solvency of the MCO’s.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: Contract Termination Date prior 09-28-2005 sixteen (16) years from date of expiration or termination. Contract Termination Date 09-28-2005 09-28-2012 09-28-2020. Contract Termination Date 9-28-2012 Statute of Limitations Date nine (9) years from date of expiration or termination
